argv: import json,sys;from pathlib import Path;root=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI');sys.path.insert(0,str(root));from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_repair_bay_scan;from core.repair_bay_handoff import build_repair_handoff;text=(root/'core'/'foxai_web.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8');markers=['REPAIR_BAY_HANDOFF_READINESS_GUARD_V2_1_BROWSER_START','id=repairAskEngineerButton','Run a Check First','No Repair Needed','Choose a Finding','handleRepairAskEngineer','validRepairEngineerCommand','This handoff is already open in Mission Console.'];assert all(m in text for m in markers),[m for m in markers if m not in text];r=run_repair_bay_scan(root,mode='quick',context={'validation':'repair_bay_v2_1_live_readiness_smoke'});s=r.get('safety') or {};assert r.get('read_only') is True,r;assert s.get('network_used') is False,s;assert s.get('commands_run') is False,s;assert int(s.get('files_written') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('repairs_applied') or 0)==0,s;bad=build_repair_handoff(root,r,'finding_not_in_latest_scan',level='guided');assert bad.get('ok') is False,bad;assert bad.get('implementation_authorized') is False,bad;assert 'engineer_command' not in bad,bad;assert int(bad.get('changes_applied') or 0)==0,bad;print(json.dumps({'REPAIR_BAY_V2_1_LIVE_OK':True,'checks':(r.get('summary') or {}).get('checks'),'pre_scan_guard':True,'healthy_guard':True,'strict_finding_resolution':True,'duplicate_open_guard':True,'implementation_authorized':False},indent=2))
